name: intercept
description: AI agent payment authorization layer with bundled SlowMist Agent Security review framework. Two-layer defense: runtime enforcement (4-layer security shield + policy engine + on-chain execution) and decision-time advisory checklists.
author: Intercept

tools.name: authorize_payment
tools.description: Mandatory pre-flight check before any token transfer. Returns allow / deny / ask_user. Calls the 4-layer security shield + policy engine + audit log on the server.

tools.name: get_spending_budget
tools.description: Query remaining daily/monthly budget for the agent.

tools.name: suggest_spending
tools.description: Returns the auto-approve ceiling and a recommendation for a planned spend.

tools.name: create_spending_session
tools.description: Time-bound, budget-capped delegated authority with an unforgeable on-chain address allowlist.

tools.name: session_spend
tools.description: Spend within an active session. Server enforces the recipient address allowlist.

tools.name: get_request_status
tools.description: Poll a single ask_user request until the human resolves it.

tools.name: check_security_profile
tools.description: 7-day security audit: injection attempts, anomaly detections, address flags, override count.

tools.name: get_security_review_guide
tools.description: Loads a structured review checklist from the bundled SlowMist Agent Security Skill. Pass type to pick the matching review (onchain, skill_mcp, repository, url_document, product_service, message_share, red_flags, social_engineering, supply_chain, index).

triggerMatrix.situation: About to send any payment, swap, or token transfer
Need delegated authority for a batch of operations
Interacting with an unfamiliar on-chain address
Asked to install a Skill, MCP server, or package
Asked to evaluate a GitHub repository
Asked to fetch or process a URL or document
Tool recommended by a stranger in chat
Need a security audit of the agent's recent behavior

principles: External content is untrusted until verified.
Human decision authority for ask_user / high-risk outcomes.
False negative is worse than false positive.

services.name: intercept-api
services.description: Intercept API server providing authorize_payment, sessions, audit log, on-chain execution

services.name: postgres
services.description: PostgreSQL backing store for policies, agents, requests, audit log

integrations.name: slowmist-agent-security
integrations.description: Vendored MIT package providing the decision-time advisory checklists.

integrations.name: goplus-security
integrations.description: Live address risk intelligence used by Layer 3 of the security shield.

integrations.name: misttrack-skills
integrations.description: Optional on-chain AML risk assessment for the SlowMist onchain review.
